creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 242170
Update www/tor-browser to 12.0.6

Update www/tor-browser to 12.0.6 which is based on Firefox ESR 102.11

Checked: 
- GPG signature for source taball (OK)
- poudriere build on 14-amd64 ports-main (OK)

No changes to www/firefox-esr since 102.10 except for some pkg-message updates

More test-builds in progress.
